reviews.author: Shakeel Butt
reviews.summary: Requested clarification on a specific sentence in the commit message and suggested minor code formatting changes. Provided an Acked-by after the issues were addressed.

2026-05-11.patch_summary: This patch series aims to introduce per-memcg-per-node kmem accounting, allowing for accurate tracking of kernel memory usage on a per-node basis. The patches modify various parts of the Linux kernel to implement this new accounting mechanism, including changes to memcontrol, slab, and zswap.
